configurations.name: Run Script: start (dominion-os-1.0)
configurations.command: bash -lc 'cd /workspaces/dominion-os-demo-build && PORT=8080 SERVICE_NAME=dominion-os-1.0 PROJECT_ID=dominion-os-1-0-main REGION=us-central1 if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then exec .venv/bin/python command_core.py; elif [ -x scripts/.venv/bin/python ]; then exec scripts/.venv/bin/python command_core.py; else exec python3 command_core.py; fi'
